prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your saas startup forward
items: Conduct 5 customer discovery interviews with potential users in your target market
Research and analyze 3 direct competitors to understand their features, pricing, and market positioning
Define your core value proposition and write a clear one-sentence description of what your SaaS solves
Create a detailed technical specification document outlining your core features, user flow, and system architecture
Research and document 5 different SaaS business models and pricing strategies used in your industry
Set up basic legal protections by registering your business entity and creating essential legal documents
